All ComponentsApp ShellSidebar & TreeToolbarCanvas & PreviewAddon PanelControlsDocs PanelStatus BarStory Card

Story Card

Linked card for story overview grids, starters pages, and documentation indexes. Includes icon, title, meta tags, and quality card variant.

Story Card Grid

Component Workshop

Default story tree, preview canvas, and controls panel.

starter 12 stories

Design System Docs

Documentation-first pages with props tables and inline examples.

docs 8 components

Testing Dashboard

Visual regression, interaction tests, and a11y status at a glance.

24 passing 2 failing

Addon Lab

Controls-heavy variant for building and testing addon panels.

experimental 
<a class="cf-story-card" href="/stories/button--primary">
  <span class="cf-story-icon"><i class="bi bi-window-sidebar"></i></span>
  <div>
    <h2 class="cf-story-title">Component Workshop</h2>
    <p class="cf-muted mb-2">Default story tree and canvas.</p>
    <div class="cf-story-meta">
      <span class="badge text-bg-secondary">starter</span>
      <span>12 stories</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</a>

Story Icon Variants

The icon badge uses Bootstrap Icons. Swap the class to match component category.

Alerts

Quality Card

Use .cf-quality-card in testing dashboards and status grids. Gets a green top accent border to signal quality data.

Visual Tests
24 ✓ passing
Interaction
18 ✓ passing
Accessibility
2 ✗ violations
Coverage
94% of stories 
<div class="cf-quality-card">
  <div class="cf-muted small mb-1">Visual Tests</div>
  <strong class="d-block h5 mb-0">24 <span class="text-success">✓</span></strong>
  <span class="cf-muted small">passing</span>
</div>

Classes

ClassDescription
.cf-story-cardFlex card with hover lift + shadow. Use as an <a> for navigation.
.cf-story-iconGradient icon badge, 2.25rem square. Place a Bootstrap Icons <i> inside.
.cf-story-titleCard heading — 0.95rem, 700 weight, no bottom margin.
.cf-story-metaFlex row of tags and counts below the title. Wraps on small widths.
.cf-quality-cardNon-linked metric card with a 3px green top border. Use in quality dashboards.
Docs ready Components FantasyUI
